title: tornados pack
description: If you wanted to play Minecraft with tornadoes and storms, but one ProtoManly's Weather isn't enough for you, and downloading a bunch of mods takes a long time and is tedious, then you've come to the right place!
body:
As you may have already understood, this modpack includes 35~ mods, 25~ of which are for beauty/convenience, 3 more are ProtoManly's Weather, EF Scale Announcer Protomanly's Weather and EAS. I might add different mods from time to time; if there’s a specific mod you’d like to see, please let me know in the comments.
I forgot to mention that I am not fluent in English, so I translate everything into English using a translator. If there are any errors in the text, I apologize.

If you are not familiar with PMW, here are some pictures of the available items and what the tornadoes look like.
Oh, right—the images in my mod pack might not include all the items from pmweather, since it’s constantly being updated.
😲😲WARNING😱😱Minimum requirements for playing with this modpack:
 1050ti, 16 GB RAM, Ryzen 5 5600
